salesexecutive_description: Hire a Sales Executive to sell ads on your website.
developer_description: Developers produce technical components for building websites.
designer_description: Designers produce graphical components for building websites.
manager_description: Managers are used to control all kinds of employees. Managers give employees a speed bonus.
leaddeveloper_description: Lead Developers take care of merging components together into modules.
sysadmin_description: SysAdmins produce components for configuring servers.
marketer_description: Hire a Marketer to generate new users for your websites.
hrmanager_description: Hire an HR Manager to be able to control working hours. An HR Manager will control multiple regular Managers.
smallretirementplan_description: Ensure the future of your employees by putting money into their retirement savings.
freebeverages_description: Increase employee satisfaction by paying for free beverages.
freegymmembership_description: Provide a free gym membership to help your employees get into shape.
extendedretirementplan_description: Extend your employees' retirement plan to include the sweet things in life.
freehealthcare_description: Take care of your employees' medical bills.
fullretirementplan_description: This full retirement plan allows your employees to live a life of luxury.
paidtransportation_description: Make your employees' life easier by paying for all their transportation expenses.
framework_description: Framework: Increases how many features a website can include in a release. The framework also extends how many levels a feature can be upgraded.
producttype_description: Website Type: Each website type has different audience and income per user. Remember what platforms (Web, Desktop, Mobile) are most popular when choosing features on the next page.
gettingstarted_enter_name: To get started enter a name for your company below:
allow_run_background: Allow game to run in background
restart_to_take_effect: You have to restart the game for these changes to take effect.
not_enough_money_this: You do not have enough money.
no_more_workstations: You don't have any available workstations left. Upgrade your building on the City Map.
tip_multi_place: Tip: Hold SHIFT to place multiple items at once.
loans_description: All loans can be paid instantly when you have the money, without additional cost.
inventory_empty: Your inventory is empty. Use developers and designers to produce components.
no_contracts_available: There are currently no contracts available. Hire Sales Executives to acquire contracts.
cancel_contract_confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this contract? You will have to pay a cancellation fee of {cancellationfee}.
select_empty_workstation: Select an empty workstation to place this employee.
tip_speed: Speed: How fast this employee completes tasks compared to others. 100% is considered average.
no_employees: You do not have any employees yet.
name: Name
how_change_working_hours: To change working hours you need an HR Manager assigned to this team
working_hours_effect: Working hour changes will take effect the next day.
confirm_upgrade_employee: Are you sure you want to upgrade {name} to level {level}? Salary will be increased by {price}/month.
confirm_module_switch: Are you sure you want to switch to this module and cancel the one you're currently working on? Components will be returned to inventory.
confirm_component_switch: Are you sure you want to switch to this component and cancel the one you're currently working on?
confirm_cancel_component: Are you sure you want to cancel this development? Your work will be lost and cannot be resumed.
manager_tip: Select which employees you want this manager to control. Each employee can only be controlled by 1 manager.
welcomemail_body:
Hi there,

Welcome to the Startup Company Beta.

As the game is under constant development, the amount of tips and hints are greatly reduced. This means you have to learn a lot by yourself.

To help you start off, I recommend following the advice given by your investor in the bottom right corner.

Best,
Jonas
employeequit_body: Hi, I have been very happy with my work here at {companyName}. However recently I haven't felt like the company and my goals align anymore. I hereby resign my position as {employeeTypeName}. Best of luck, {name}
lowmoneywarning_body:
Dear customer,

Our systems are indicating that your current balance is below $5,000.00.

Please note that we will close your account if you go below $0.

Best regards,
Nordiwa Banking
contractcancel_body: Is this how you do business? We hereby cancel Contract #{number}. Do not expect any more business from us.
loancreated_body:
Hello {companyName},
        
The requested loan of {amount} has been transferred to your bank account. Payments will happen automatically starting tomorrow.
        
Thank you for using {provider}.
loanpaidout_subject: Your loan has been paid out
loanpaidout_body:
Hello {companyName},
        
We have noticed that you successfully paid out the remaining amount of your loan.
        
Thank you doing business with {provider}. We hope to see you again.
select_employee_to_place: Select an employee to place on this workstation.
contract_type_description:
Fixed price: Price is defined by the client. You can either accept or deny.
Bidding: You and other competitors are bidding on the contract for the lowest price.
contract_size_description: The size defines how many components and modules the contract will contain. Sizes are relative to what you have completed in the past.
contract_search_time_description: Search time increases when you activate more filters.
new_contract_awaiting: A new contract is awaiting your response...
contract_request_description: The following contract is awaiting your acceptance. Please notice that declining a contract will generate a 30 day cooldown period for that specific company.
competing_other_companies: You'll be competing with other companies to win this contract. Select a desired price per hour.
confirm_exit_game: Are you sure you want to exit the game?
confirm_delete_savegame: Are you sure you want to delete this save game? You will not be able to recover it.
subject: Subject
warning_leaddev_missing_components: You don't have all the required components to merge this module.
piracymail_subject: This one is personally for you
piracymail_body:
Hi there,

My name is Jonas, I'm the developer of Startup Company.

I noticed you've been playing my game for quite some time now. I really hope you're having a good time!

The reason why I'm sending you this email is to thank you personally for purchasing the game. Surviving as an independent game developer is harder than ever and is only possible because of amazing people like you!

Thank you for the support!

All the best,
Jonas
confirm_dismiss: Are you sure you want to fire this employee? Firing employees will decrease the mood of the rest of your employees.
confirm_dismiss_contract: The current contract will also be cancelled and you will have to pay the cancellation fee.
confirm_upgrade_building: After upgrading to this building, you won't be able to downgrade again. Do you want to proceed?
welcome_description:
Welcome to Startup Company.
Please select desired language:
confirm_disable_feature: Are you sure you want to disable this feature? By disabling it, you will lose all progress for the feature.
bank_ran_out_money: You ran out of money! Fortunately, the bank granted us a credit of {amount}. Make sure you don't go below that, otherwise the game will be over!
recruitment_duration_description: Duration defines how long a recruitment session will run. The longer, the more candidates, but also the higher the price.
recruitment_price_description: The upfront and non-returnable price for executing the recruitment session.
loan_confirm: Are you sure you want to take this loan?
loan_pay_confirm: This will subtract {amount} from your bank account. Are you sure?
researcher_description: Hire a Researcher to research new features and frameworks.
economicsetback_description: Don't complete any contracts for 14 days
starvation_description: Don't complete any contracts for 30 days
intoblack_description: Have a monthly profit of at least $0
asmallloan: A Small Loan of a Million Dollars
schedule_tip: Tip: Mood always decreases while working. Optimize the schedule to get as many hours with as little mood decrease as possible.
mods_tip_restart: Remember to restart the game for new mods to be installed.
mod_failed: {name} failed to extract, contact the mod creator.
stock_buy_confirm: Are you sure you want to buy {amount} stocks for {price}?
stock_sell_confirm: Are you sure you want to sell {amount} stocks for {price}?
hosting_revenue_warning: You are spending more money on servers than you're generating revenue. Improve efficiency of feature instances and reduce the amount of servers installed.
ran_out_of_money: Oh, no. You've overdrawn your account. You have to take out a loan to continue running your company.
workstation_max_level: This workstation reached the maximum level.
textads_description: Shows ads as basic text strings on your website. Generates the lowest revenue (CPM) but doesn't annoy users very much.
bannerads_description: Shows a graphical banner, has higher visibility compared to text ads and revenue is 50% higher. However, it can irritate users.
videoads_description: Auto-playing video ad. The ad is very annoying to the user but generated revenue is 100% higher.
subscriptions_description: Alternatively, you can force the user to pay for selected features (premium).
mod_uploaded: Successfully created your mod on Steam! Make sure to subscribe to your mod and restart the game in order to be able to update it.
tip_competitors: Tip: Valuations will be updated every 7th day.
emailcampaigns_description: Go directly to the user's inbox. Better conversion rate, but expensive.
different_schedule: New schedule will take effect after midnight.
steamworks_confirm: Please note that use of any third-party mods is at your own risk and can potentially break your savegames.
confirm_send_home: Are you sure you want to send {name} home for {days} day(s)? It will increase the employee's mood, but they will be unavailable for work.
confirm_send_everyone_home: Are you sure you want to send everyone home for {days} day(s)?
emotion_days_off: I could really use some days off!
emotion_more_js_frameworks: There should really be more Javascript frameworks these days!
emotion_kwitch: I'm totally gonna watch LIRIK on Kwitch today!
emotion_might_quit: If my boss doesn't allow me some time off soon, I think I'll find myself a new job.
emotion_ringedin_frustration: If only I had more RingedIn connections, it would look like I'm more important.
emotion_designer_flat: This design is not flat enough...
emotion_dark_theme_editor: There's no doubt I write better code with a dark-themed editor.
emotion_deleted: Wait what! Where did it go? Isn't it -rf?
emotion_more_power: It's not our code, the CEO is just too cheap to install more servers!
emotion_takes_so_long: I don't understand why that task takes so long.
emotion_demand_furniture: I wish this office had a {value}.
emotion_demand_desktype: I should be sitting at a {value}.
emotion_demand_workhours: It must be amazing only working {7} hours a day....
emotion_demand_fireemployee: Argh, how can {value} still be working here!!
milestone_max_feature_level: Reach a feature max level of at least {max_level}
milestone_minimum_profit: Generate a profit of at least {minimum_profit} per month
milestone_adspacedeals: Negotiate at least {deals} ad space deals
confirm_buyout: Are you sure you want to buy out this investor for {amount}?
new_product_deny: To start a new website, you have to buy out your existing investor or complete at least 15 milestones.
tip_training: Use training to increase your employee's speed. Once the employee is at maximum speed, you'll be able to upgrade the employee to the next level.
potential_users_warning: Potential users reached. Upgrade or add features.
production_no_components: No components or modules available. Select more employees in the Employees Tab.
tip_production: Managers will automatically assign tasks to their employees whenever they are idle. Items with the lowest stock amount will be prioritized.
researcher_info: Use Research Points to research features and frameworks for your websites.
efficiency_tip: Upgrade efficiency to decrease required CU, reducing hosting costs.
reduced_performance_description:
Reduced Performance Activated
Throughput has been reduced due to high temperature.
overheat_protection_description:
Overheat Protection Activated
Throughput has been stopped due to high temperature.
virtualserverlimit_body:
Dear customer,

We would like to thank you for your cooperation. We're happy to be part of your success.

Unfortunately, our primary focus is to deliver fast and cheap virtual servers to small and medium-sized companies. This means that we can no longer offer you additional servers.

 You can, of course, continue using your existing servers, as long as you don't exceed {cu} compute units.

Thanks for your time
CEO of FastClouds
merging_description: Once you own 100% of a competitor you can transfer all its users to your own website of the same type.
warning_not_enough_potential_users: Your website's "potential users" is too low. Increase it without increasing your registered users (running marketing).
warning_not_owner: You do not own 100% of this competitor. Buy more stocks.
product_merged_description: This website was merged with {productname} and does not exist anymore.
warning_no_investment_offers: You haven't received any investment offers yet.
email_investment_offer_body: To the CEO of {productName} We at {investorName} have been following your success for quite some time. We are very impressed with your progress and we want to be part of it. We would like to offer you {amount} for {percentage}% of {productName} to allow you to progress even further. We have sent the offer digitally to your product's Venture Capital view. If you would like to accept, all you have to do is click the green button. We hope to be able to support you in your further growth. Best regards, {investorName}
hosting_occupied: You already allocated all of your resources to other websites.
product_type_mismatch: The selected website's type is different to the competitor's and cannot be merged.
upgrade_framework_deny: You need to upgrade all features to max level before you can upgrade the framework.
no_campaigns: You haven't created any campaigns yet.
missing_insight: You do not have insight for this combination of targeted audience.
filter_not_available: This filter is not available for the selected marketing type.
marketing_campaign_deny: You have to reach at least 10% of the audience to create a report.
feature_type_revenue_description: These features allow you to generate revenue from your website.
feature_type_users_description: These features increase your website's maximum potential users.
label: Label
negotiation_left: {name} has decided to leave the negotiation.
no_ad_spaces_warning: This website doesn't have any ad spaces to sell. Add one of the following features: Text Ads, Banner Ads or Video Ads.
delete_ad_feature_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this feature? All ad space deals will be cancelled.
investor_message_milestone_1: Hi there, Nice to meet you, my name is Rosy and I'm your new advisor from Devhives. Have you noticed the milestones underneath your website? Every time you complete a milestone a payment will be made instantly. Start by getting an office. We recommend that you rent the Small Building in the top left corner of the map.
investor_message_milestone_4: Wow! Your new Landing Page will definitely make people excited about {productName}! All we need is a bit of marketing to get some traffic. Go to your website and select the Marketing Tab. From there, create an Email Campaign and watch the number of registered users increase. Don't be afraid to increase the daily budget.
investor_message_milestone_satisfaction: Great work, your first real feature! Have you noticed the smiley in top the left corner of the features tab? This is indicating how satisfied your users are. Currently they are not too happy because your new feature is too low level. Keeping satisfaction high is very important. If it becomes low, users will start to abandon your website. Increase your website's satisfaction by increasing your new feature's level. You will need to hire a Lead Developer in order to create the required modules.
investor_message_milestone_more_users: Beautiful! When upgrading features (to increase your potential users) you should always try to balance the levels between your features to keep your users happy. We need more users! Continue to run Email Campaigns. Make sure your potential users are higher than your registered users. Increase your potential users by upgrading feature levels.
investor_message_milestone_8: So many users! I have to admit, people here at {investorName} are starting to bet on your success, we are very impressed! Now we need to talk about servers. As you start to add or upgrade features, more CU (Compute Units) will be required. Start by hiring a SysAdmin just as you did with the Developer and Designer. Next, add one Mini Cloud Server by selecting your website and clicking the Hosting Tab. Use your SysAdmin to produce the required components.
investor_message_milestone_first_income: There we go. Remember to keep an eye on server load. If you go above 100% you'll start to lose users. Now, we should slowly start focusing on generating some income. Start by researching and adding the Text Ads feature to an empty feature slot. Next, hire a Sales Executive and negotiate your first ad contract.
investor_message_milestone_more_workstat: Good job! Remember to keep your income steady and respond to any deals that need negotiation. Have you noticed that our staff is starting to sit closer to each other? Developers hate that! We better get a bigger office. Go to the City Map and rent a bigger office.
investor_message_milestone_valuation: Good choice! For the next milestone we just want you to work on your website. Keep upgrading feature levels and run marketing campaigns. Don't be afraid to hire new employees. You can see your current valuation under your website's Stats tab. Now go reach the targeted valuation.
investor_message_milestone_more_users_2: Another well executed milestone! Alright, we have to look into improving our marketing efforts. Start by hiring a marketer. Next up, create your first Text Ads campaign. You should take a look at the insight feature. After a campaign have reached 10% of it's audience, you'll be able to get further insight. It's worth looking into! Reach the targeted registered users.
investor_message_milestone_12: Congratulations on the astounding growth of {productName}. We need to talk about frameworks. Right now you are using a free framework which simply won't be able to handle the feature levels that we will need in the future. To upgrade your framework, click the Upgrade button in the top right corner of your website's Features Tab.
investor_message_milestone_13: Great choice! The new framework allows you to reach much higher feature levels. It's time to talk about servers again. Until now we have used "cloud servers", which is basically just someone else's server that we rent. We believe insourcing our servers is a good idea for {productName}. Start by going to the City Map and rent a building suitable for hosting servers.
investor_message_milestone_14: Welcome to your brand new hosting facility! This is where you can buy and setup your own servers instead of renting expensive cloud servers. Start by buying and placing a rack. This is where we are going to install our servers. Click on your new rack and install 1 web server, 1 database server and 1 cache server. Lastly, make sure all servers are configured by simply clicking the server and then clicking the Configure button. Reach the target Produced CU.
investor_message_milestone_15: Great! Our SysAdmins are saying our new servers are running optimally. Your next milestone is a big one. Currently we're losing money every month. We want you to turn the tables and make a profit. Continue to introduce and improve features, run marketing campaigns and expand your new hosting center. It's probably a good idea to hire more Sales Executives to ensure that there are no gaps in your ad schedule. I'll get back to you when the company earns a good sum of money.
investor_message_milestone_more_users_3: Oh my gosh, congratulations! {productName} is officially making profit! I just talked with the other investors and we all believe it's time to step up! Run marketing campaigns, upgrades features and install more servers. Don't forget to hire Managers to make your life easier. Reach the target registered users.
investor_message_milestone_higher_cpm: You're making very quick progress, well done! I just left the conference room and the board believes you can make even more money! If you haven't already, implement a higher paying revenue feature like Banner Ads or Video Ads. Remember to keep an eye on satisfaction, we do not want it to go below 50%! Negotiate some new deals and reach the target website income.
investor_message_milestone_16: The investors are super excited! Last time I heard from them, they were flying in their private jets to Marbella to celebrate. You are officially a success now! When you're done celebrating you should start focusing on a new goal: acquiring a competitor. It will not only require a large sum of money, but you will also need to scale our data center to be able to handle all the new users we gain from the merge. Continue to build capital until you can afford to acquire a competitor.
investor_message_milestone_17: Message from the developer: This is the last advisor tip in this beta version. More will be added in future releases. Keep going on your own, you're doing great! Jonas
reach_too_small: Reach is too small. Promote another feature or make your targeting less specific.
subscriptions_price_description: How much a user has to pay for the selected premium features.
subscriptions_satisfaction_description: How much the subscriptions reduce the overall satisfaction.
subscriptions_revenue_description: Estimate of your daily revenue from subscriptions.
subscriptions_premium_users_description: The features users have to pay for.
disable_premium_feature_warning: This feature cannot be disabled because it's currently a premium feature.
itemlisting_description: Allow your users to view and create listing for items for sale.
sharingfunctionality_description: Enable your users to conveniently share pages to friends and family.
landingpage_description: The first page your visitors see. Explains to the visitor what to expect from your website.
adspace_queue_full: The queue for the selected ad type is full (max {days} days).
imageupload_description: Allow your users to upload their own images.
paymentsystem_description: Allow your users to choose to pay using credit cards or cryptocurrency.
videofunctionality_description: Enables video playback to all your users.
contentmanagementsystem_description: Let your users change content on the website.
videoeditor_description: Offer an easy way for users to edit their videos.
offlinecontent_description: Allows your users to save content to their device and use it while offline.
livestreaming_description: Make it possible for users to watch and stream videos live.
commentfunctionality_description: Adds a comment feed allowing your users to discuss amongst each other.
chatsystem_description: Let your users chat with each other real-time.
theoverclocker_description: Produce 1 million CUs with all servers at 200%
sellout_description: Own less than 50% of your own website
no_contract_warning: No contract. Hire a Sales Executive to fill the slot.
no_current_contract_warning: This employee isn't managing a contract yet.
contract_cancellation_warning: Are you sure you want to cancel this contract? You will have to pay a cancellation fee of {price}.
contract_exists_already_warning: This employee is already managing a contract.
transaction_contract_penalty_fee: Contract #{number} penalty fee ({percentage}% from daily target)
timeslot_blocked_warning: The selected hours conflict with an existing time slot.
cannot_delete_feature_warning: This feature cannot be deleted while it contains active contracts.
level_tip2: Upgrading features increases potential users and satisfaction, but requires more CUs.
guaranteed_impressions_info: The minimum number of impressions you have to deliver per day in order to avoid a penalty fee.
contract_length_info: The number of days you have to wait in order to avoid a cancellation fee.
penalty_fee_info: The percentage you will have to pay if not delivering the guaranteed impressions. Based on CPM.
exceeded_yesterday_impressions_warning: You are guaranteeing more impressions than the time slot performed yesterday. Underperforming will result in a penalty.
impressions_info: The maximum number of impressions this lead is interested in.
offers_info: The minimum CPM paid by this lead if all impressions are guaranteed.
no_ad_features_warning: The selected website has no ad features.
no_timeslots_warning: The selected feature has no time slots configured.
timeslots_description: Time slots are used to split a day into blocks of hours allowing you to accept multiple contracts on the same feature.
next_30_days_description: All data is estimated over a 30 day period. Changes to a website's registered users, ad contracts or subscriptions will affect the estimated amount.
employeelowmood_label:
{employeename} ({employeetype}) is unhappy and considering a new job.

Do you want to offer a {salaryraise} salary raise plus a {bonus} bonus?
employeecompetitoroffer_label:
{competitorname} has offered {employeename} ({employeetype}) a significantly higher salary.

Do you want to counter the offer with a {salaryraise} salary raise plus a {bonus} bonus?
gamecompleted_start:
Congratulations, {productname} is now the world's most popular website!

You have completed Startup Company!

It took you a total of {days} days! You can now calculate your highscore.
gamecompleted_end:
Thank you for playing!

Note: You can continue playing after your highscore has been calculated but there won't be any more content to unlock.
missing_report_info: Create a report to reveal this data.
adcontractended_label: Contract #{contractnumber} has ended and the time slot is no longer occupied.
select_funding_type_info: Select whether you want an investor or take out bank loans to start your business.
delete_website_warning: Are you sure you want to delete the website {name}? This action cannot be reversed.
not_unlocked: Not available. Use Research to unlock.
use_research_to_unlock_more: Use Research to unlock more.
investor_message_milestone_researching: Well done hiring your first employees. Next, we need to do some researching in order to get started with our website. Go to the Research Menu and research the following items: Beginner Devkit (Production), DesignerKit (Production) and the Landing Page (Features). I'll get back to you when you're done.
investor_message_milestone_3_v2: You now know how to research. You can only unlock stuff when you have available research points. The points are generated by Researchers, but we will look into this later. Now it's time to add the Landing Page to our new website. Click your website in the top right corner and select the Features Tab. Select an empty feature slot. Next click to add the Landing Page. When you are done, upgrade the Landing Page to Level 1 so that you can increase your website's potential users. This number indicates how many registered users you can attract. To upgrade the Landing Page, you will need your employees to produce the required components.
investor_message_milestone_5_v2: Awesome, that will do for now. In the future you will be able to hire marketers for more efficient campaigns. Now it's time to get back to our website and add more features! Hire a Researcher to generate Research Points. As soon as possible, research yet another feature by clicking the Research Menu and selecting the Features Tab. After unlocking the new feature, make sure to add it to your website using the Features Tab on your website. While you wait, you might want to spend some time looking at your employees' demands at the employees Stats Tab.
serverpack1_description: Basic set of servers. Ideal for smaller websites.
serverpack2_description: Mission-critical servers. Very suitable for big websites with more than 1 million users.
serverpack3_description: High Intensity Servers. Only suitable for high traffic websites.
serverpack4_description: Pack of XServers: The most powerful rack servers ever manufactured.
beginnerleaddevkit_description: Unlocks all Lead Developer beginner modules.
intermediateleaddevkit_description: Unlocks all Lead Developer intermediate modules.
expertleaddevkit_description: Unlocks all Lead Developer expert modules.
clockrate_controlled: Clock rate is handled by a controller.
max_virtual_servers_warning: Maximum virtual CU reached. Consider renting a hosting building instead.
supporter_description: Supporters are responsible for responding to customers' support tickets.
no_team_members: No team members. Select the team directly from the supporters.
support_team_description: Use teams to limit a group of supporters to specific ticket complexities.
support_satisfaction_description: Tickets should be resolved within 36 hours otherwise they will decrease satisfaction.
resolve_time_description: The average amount of hours until a ticket has been resolved in the past.
no_support_tickets: No support tickets awaiting. Good job!
investor_message_milestone_supporter: Nice, that was a big one! With big success comes bigger responsibility. I don't know if you have noticed, but {productName} received its first support ticket! Support tickets are problems and issues coming from your users. You can resolve these tickets by hiring Supporters. If you don't resolve tickets within 36 hours, they will slowly start to affect your website's overall satisfaction. Hire Supporters and resolve the support tickets.
add_team_member_tooltip: Add members to the team by selecting the individual Supporter.
bonus_therecruiter_description: Increase chances of attracting superstar employees by 10%.
configure_ceo_warning: You have to configure your CEO before you can continue.
recruitment_negotiation_left: {name} was offended by your offer and left the negotiation.
feature_unavailable_intermediate: Only available for employees that are Intermediate or higher
no_candidates: No candidates. Start headhunting to find new talents.
cant_afford_send_offer: You can't afford to send this offer.
employee_age_description: Employees will retire when they become 65 years old.
investor_message_milestone_recruitment: Sweet. We're now ready to hire some employees. Click your CEO (if not selected already) to headhunt and hire your first employees according to the "Next milestone" in the top right corner. Remember to buy and seat them at a desk.
recruiter_description: Recruiters are used to headhunt and hire new employees.
confirm_recruitment_leave_negotiation: Are you sure you want to leave the negotiation? You won't be able to negotiate with this candidate again.
supporter_tip: Tip: Supporters become unhappy when working on tickets below their expertise.
no_available_employees_v2: No unseated employees available. Use your CEO to hire new employees.
employee_types_research_tip: You can unlock more employee types from the Research menu.
investor_message_milestone_ceo: Good job reaching your first milestone! Next, we need to get you seated on a desk. Go to the Purchase Menu and buy a Beginner Desk. Then click on the desk and seat yourself.
milestone_seated_ceo: Seat the CEO at a desk
confirm_instant_hire: Are you sure you want to instantly hire this candidate for {salary}/month?
instant_hire_requirements: Instant hire requires both salary and demand to be researched.
sell_device_confirm: Are you sure you want to sell this device for {price} (20% below purchase price)?
stocks_sold_warning: As you almost went bankrupt the bank has sold parts of your owned stocks. See your finance transactions for more info.
confirm_game_exit:
Are you sure you want to exit Startup Company?

Remember to save your game from the main menu.
confirm_savegame_overwrite: Are you sure you want to overwrite an existing savegame?
mass_configure_tip: "Mass Configure" configures all servers of the rack which aren't already configured.
configure_tip: Servers has to be configured before they produce any throughput.
rack_install_no_space: The rack doesn't have enough space available.
manager_bonus_tip: The speed bonus is only applied when the Manager is not at home.
upgrade_desk_description: Desks can only be upgraded to types of the same size.
placement_tips_v2:
Press R or right click to rotate items
Press Delete to remove items
Hold SHIFT to place multiple items at once.
daily_payment_tooltip: Contracts are being paid daily at noon.
confirm_mass_fire: Are you sure you want to fire all of the selected employees? This action cannot be reversed.
pay_bonus_description: Paying employees a bonus will instantly increase their mood to 100%.
ccc_ddos_attack_tooltip: The clock rate to change to if a DDoS attack is detected.
ccc_viral_boost_tooltip: The clock rate to change to if a Viral Boost is detected.
rules_description_v2: Rules will change the clock rate of all servers whenever events (DDoS Attack or Viral Boost) is detected on a specific website. The clock rate will automatically return to the Default Clock Rate when the event is over.
controller_log_activated_v2: {rule}: {event} detected for website {website}. Clock rates changed to {clockrate}%
controller_log_deactivated_v2: {rule}: No events detected. Clock rates restored to {clockrate}%
manual_savegame_warning:
Welcome to Beta 22

This update introduces "manual save functionality".

Please notice that you have to save the game manually from the main menu!

The game will still auto-save every 5 minute, but to a new save file instead of overwriting your existing one.
bonus_cooldown_warning: You'll have to wait {daysleft} days till you can pay another bonus.
bottleneck_warning: Bottleneck detected! Increase this value to increase your produced CU.
loan_minimum_valuation_not_met: Your company doesn't meet the minimum valuation required for this loan.
minimum_valuation_tooltip: The minimum company valuation required to take out this loan. Your valuation is available on the Company Profile.
survival_investment:
I got bad news, the company is in a very bad shape! The banks have declined to loan the company any more money and we're currently unable to pay any of our expenses.

Fortunately {investor} has decided to give the company one last investment. You have received {payment} and {investor} has increased their ownership by {percentage}%.

The message from the investors are clear: Acknowledge this as a last warning. Cut down on expenses and increase revenue ASAP.

The next time the bank balance goes below $0 we are forced to declare the company bankrupt.
bankruptcy_description: As you haven't been able to pay your expenses and all loan options are out, the state has declared you bankrupt.
activate_mod_warning:
Mods can potentially harm your computer and corrupt your savegames.

Devhives does not moderate mods or provide support to mod-related issues.

Always backup your savegames and only activate mods from creators that you trust. Remember: everyone can create and upload mods on Steam Workshop.

Are you sure you want to activate this mod?
headquarter_upgrade_warning:
This building and your existing building isn't sharing the same floor layout. Only floor 1 and 2 will be moved. All furniture and desks on floor 4 and 5 will be sold and employees has to be re-seated.

Are you sure you want to proceed?
investor_message_milestone_more_users_4: Wow, the economy of {productName} is more than healthy now. Remember back when we were struggling to just make a dollar in revenue? Our investors want to join a new club and it's not just another golf club; it's the 10 million users club. As all members of the board fully trusts your leadership you have received a large amount of money to secure {productName}'s journey to the 10 million users. Reach the target registered users.
investor_message_milestone_top_3: One less competitor to care about. Nicely done! Acquiring competitors can be a much more efficient way of generating new users than marketing. Our next goal is major but we're heading for the stars, right? We want {productName} to be the 3rd biggest {productType} of the world.
investor_message_milestone_top_1: Top 3! Just think about that, Top 3! Congratulations with the incredible result. Obviously, if we can reach Top 3 we have to go for the last one, right? Let's do the impossible: Become the biggest {productType} in the world!
investor_message_milestone_ending: Are you kidding me! {productName} is officially the worlds most popular {productType}. Congratulations, I'm almost out of words. What a journey this has been. I've never experienced anything like this. You're truly an outstanding entrepreneur. As your advisor my job here is done. There's no more I can teach you. It has been nothing but a pleasure working with you. I hope our paths will cross again in the future. Best wishes Pam
beginnerdesignerkit_description: Unlocks all beginner components for Designers.
intermediatedesignerkit_description: Unlocks all intermediate components for Designers.
expertdesignerkit_description: Unlocks all expert components for Designers.
thecollector_description: Reach an inventory of more than 100,000 of the same component/module
notsocreative_description: Choose a not so creative website name
superspeed_description: Have an employee reaching a base speed of 480%
worlddomination_description: Became Top #1 of all website types in one game
smallbutefficient_description: Reach 1,000,000 users while still in the smallest office building
confirm_dismiss_all: Are you sure you want to dismiss all candidates?
investor_message_milestone_intro: Hi there, Nice to meet you, my name is Rosy and I'm your new advisor from Devhives. Have you noticed the milestones underneath your website? Every time you complete a milestone a payment will be made instantly. Start by getting an office. We recommend that you rent the office at 4 West Bridge Street, Downtown.
feature_type_enhancement_description: Features that generally improve the website.
adblockobfuscator_description: Fight ad blockers by covering up your ads to make it harder for ad blockers to detect them.
outsourcingexecutive_description: Outsourcing Executives allows you to do business with your competitors by selling and buying components/modules.
search_for_tasks_description: Earn some extra cash by selling components and modules from your inventory to your competitors.
create_task_description: Speed up your production by buying components and modules produced by your competitors.
outsourcing_requirements_description:
Select the components and module you want delivered.

Each unit will increase the submission fee by $30.
tip_outsourcing: Use Outsourcing Executives to find more available tasks. New tasks automatically show up on this list.
outsourcing_you_won: You won the task! Click below to deliver the requirements within {hours} hours.
outsourcing_task_delivered: The task has successfully been delivered.
outsourcing_waiting_for_bids: Your task is now online. You'll be able to see offers real-time above.
outsourcing_awaiting_delivery: The bidding has ended and the task will be delivered in {hours} hours.
outsourcing_task_received: An outsourcing task has been delivered to your inventory by {competitorname}
tooltip_penalty_paid: You didn't deliver this task in time. A penalty fee has been paid to the client.
notification_investment_offer: You received an investment offer from {investorname}
outsourcing_no_more_offers: You're not allowed to send more than {offers} offer(s).
confirm_pay_multiple_bonuses:
Are you sure you want to pay bonuses for a total of {price}?

Only employees who didn't receive a bonus within 30 days will be included.
tooltip_est_market_value: The estimated market value of the requirements without considering the deadline.
tooltip_penalty_fee: The fee you have to pay if you fail to deliver the requirements within the deadline.
solarpower_description: Up to 60% of all incoming solar energy never reach the earth. Developing space-based mirrors to reflect those beams of power to the earth could be the solution to all energy problems!
tidalpower_description: The ocean is filled with unused energy. Develop floating devices that collects energy from the waves and tides.
fusionpower_description: Do like the sun and use fusion power to generate endless amounts of energy. Be the first private organization to commercialize Fusion Power.
investment_project_completed_description: This project has successfully completed. The benefits are now available and you'll receive revenue from the project once a week.
ceo_not_seated: The CEO is not currently seated.
retirement_level_description_poor: Well, you will survive, but not for much longer.
retirement_level_description_average: You will have a decent and average retirement. Nothing to complain about, but a lot to dream about.
retirement_level_description_upper_middl: A large house, a yearly trip to foreign countries and expensive wine. Not bad!
retirement_level_description_rich: Retire with style! A huge house with a pool, a vacation home and multiple cars. Getting old will be amazing.
retirement_level_description_super_rich: We're talking golf clubs and fast cars! Your biggest concern is which one of your private chefs should prepare dinner.
retirement_level_description_world_leade: You are retiring with so much money that you're going to spend the rest of your life trying to get rid of it. Who knows, maybe you and your partner will create a foundation.
retirement_congratulations:
Congratulations {name}!

After {yearsactive} years of hard work you're finally ready to retire.

It has been a long journey, with many ups and downs (mostly ups).

Let's take a look at how it went!
retirement_retirement_payment_intro:
Hard to believe how much you accomplished in those years, isn't it?

Let's see how wealthy you'll be for the rest of your life...
retirement_conversation_1: Am I the only one who thinks everything started getting worse ever since {name} retired?
retirement_conversation_2: No, I noticed it too. No progress, no new features. Everything is so corporate. I miss being a startup!
retirement_conversation_3: You know what we should do? Start our own company. Seriously!
retirement_new_beginning_summary: After you retired, three of your best employees have decided to quit their jobs at {companyname} and start their own company.
retirement_fund_being_transferred: Your retirement fund is now being transferred to your bank account...
retirement_thank_you_hard_work: Thank you for all your hard work throughout the years!
career_mode_description: The game starts at the age of 18 and continues till you retire at age 67.
custom_game_description: Set your own rules and design the game exactly how you like it.
choose_name_for_ceo: Choose a name for the CEO
choose_website_name: Choose a name for your website
employee_age_description_v2: Employees will retire when they become {years} years old.
notification_new_year: It's a new year! Your retirement fund's tax percentage has been reset.
confirm_cancel_investment_project: Are you really sure you want to cancel this investment project? This action cannot be undone and you will lose all your invested money!
notification_investment_project_complete: Congratulations! The construction of {projectname} has completed.
fastsupport_description: Reach an average response time lower than 2 hours with more than 500 tickets
theaverageworker_description: Secure a retirement fund of more than $500,000
uppermiddleclass_description: Secure a retirement fund of more than $1,000,000
biggyshot_description: Secure a retirement fund of more than $45,000,000
misterbiggybiggyshot_description: Secure a retirement fund of more than $200,000,000
investor_message_milestone_researching_v: Well done hiring your first employees. Next, we need to do some researching in order to get started with our website. Go to the Research Menu, select the Features tab and research Landing Page. I'll get back to you when you're done.
employeeretired_label_v2: {name} has reached the age of {age} and retired the position as {employeetype}.
game_variables_disable_workstation_limit:
Disabling this limit can dramatically reduce game performance, especially on older computers.

Using this setting is on your own risk.
employee_requires_x_v2: This candidate only wants to work for companies who have completed the investment of {investmentproject}.
no_stocks_traded: You haven't traded any stocks yet.
jitter_unavailable: The Jitter service is currently unavailable. Please check back later.
investment_required: Requires the {investmentproject} to be completely invested.
menu_confirm_restart: The game needs to restart for this change to take effect. Do you want to restart now?
ddosprotection_description: Setup a sophisticated protective network in front of your website in order to fight DDoS attacks.
ddos_protection_efficiency_description:
The efficiency indicates how much a DDoS attack will be reduced in effect. The higher the percentage, the less impact the attack will have on your website.

As the DDoS Protection asks the users to confirm they are human, it will cause dissatisfaction to your users.
jeetlackfeatures: I don't know about {productname}... It's a nice concept, but it just lacks features! {productnamehashtag}
jeethighresponsetime: Jeez, {productname} is so slow today. Restart your router noobs! #gohomedev #lolz #dontgohome #justfixit
jeetcriticalresponsetime: Is {productname} down or is it just me? My browser says the page was taking too long to reply... #downforeveryoneorjustme
jeettoomanyads: Okay, listen to me developers at {productname}... I get you want to buy a yacht, but THIS IS TOO MANY ADS!!!!!!1
jeetinvestmenthint: It's time for our weekly stock update! This week's winner is {winnerproductname} with {winpercentage}%. The loser is {loserproductname} with {losspercentage}%. #stocks #news
jeettoomuchleveldifference: I started using {productname} recently. The {winnerfeaturename} is amazing, but the {loserfeaturename} is awful! #notgoodnotbad
jeetsupportfeedback_bad: It's literally been 2 days since I wrote to {productname}'s support and I haven't even received a single answer. Unacceptable really.. #badcustomservice
jeetsupportfeedback_good: I had a problem with {productname} so I contacted their support. {resolvetime} hours later and my problem was resolved! THAT'S REALLY IMPRESSIVE! Thank you for an outstanding service! #amazing #support
jeetrandomrage: I JUST HATE {productname} FOR NO CONSTRUCTIVE REASON WHAT SO EVAH! #stupidmonday
change_skill_description: Please note: changing the CEO's current skill will unassign managed employees, cancel active tasks and any training progress will be lost.
investmentproject_bonus_tidalpower: Access to Fusion Servers and Fusion Heat Transformers
fusionserver_description: This next-generation server utilizes fusion technology in order to reach new levels of server performance. The server produces throughput for both Webserver, Cache and Database.
thewave_description: Complete 100% investment in Tidal Power Plant
dangerousfuture_description: Complete 100% investment in Fusion Power Plant
helpsystem_description: Introduce an automated help system that reduces the number of support tickets generated and increases user satisfaction.
confirm_ceo_backstory: Please confirm that you want your CEO's backstory to be {skill}
description_select_ceo_backstory: You haven't selected your CEO's backstory yet. Your choice will affect your CEO's abilities and cannot be changed later.
backstory_designer_description: With your background as a Designer you can help produce graphical components for building your new website.
backstory_developer_description: With your background as a Developer you can help produce technical components for building your new website.
backstory_manager_description: With your background as a Manager you can have your employees follow your production plans and give them speed bonuses.
misterworldwide_description: Secure a retirement fund of more than $3,500,000,000
research_investment_project_required: You need to complete the investment of: {investmentproject}
help_ad_contracts_intro:
Ad contracts are the primary source of income on most websites. Basically, you will be selling ad spaces using Revenue Features added to your website.

Searching for contracts

In order to find customers who want to advertise on your website, you'll need to hire a Sales Executive.

Each potential customer is called a "Lead". The maximum number of leads is limited by the level of the Sales Executive.

Negotiating

Just like hiring employees, you need to negotiate ad contracts in order to get the best price.
help_ad_contracts_properties_intro: In order to negotiate, there are a few properties you'll have to understand:
help_ad_contracts_properties_table:
Guaranteed Impressions The number of times you guarantee an ad will be shown per day. You should never guarantee more impressions than the day before. More impressions result in a higher price/CPM.
Contract Length The number of days a contract has to run before it expires. Canceling a contract prematurely will force you to pay a cancellation fee. Longer contracts result in a higher price/CPM.
Offer The current CPM (price per 1000 impressions) before negotiation, based on guaranteed impressions and contract length.
Penalty Fee The percentage of CPM you will have to pay if you fail to deliver the guaranteed impressions.
Daily Payment The payment you get per day while the contract is active.
help_ad_contracts_timeslots_description: You can run multiple contracts on the same Ads Feature by splitting the day into multiple time slots.
help_controlling_time_intro: You can control the speed of time by clicking on the arrow buttons at the very top of the game window.
help_controlling_time_toggle: The pause button can be toggled, allowing you to easily return to the last selected play speed.
help_citymap_intro: The citymap gives you access to all the buildings in Startup Company. There are two types of buildings: Office and Hosting.
help_citymap_description: All buildings are rented and have to be paid for daily. There's an upfront payment you have to pay when you move into new buildings.
help_citymap_building_types_office_descr:
Office buildings hold all of your employees. This is where all the work is done.

An office building has a limitation of how many workstations (employees) are allowed. Some buildings have multiple floors.
help_citymap_building_types_hosting_desc:
Hosting buildings hold all your racks and servers. Dedicated hosting buildings are only relevant if you have reached the maximum number of virtual servers.

There is no limitation of how many devices you can install in a hosting building, except for the physical limitation. Each building comes with an initial temperature. The lower the temperature, the less cooling your servers will need.
help_purchase_intro: Any time you're in a building, you're able to purchase items using the Purchase Menu.
help_purchase_description: All items have to be researched from the Research Menu before they can be purchased. The selection of items depends on the type of building (office or hosting) that you have selected.
help_purchase_adding_items_description:
1. Select an item from the Purchase Menu.

2. Rotate the item by pressing or R.

3. Confirm the location by pressing .
help_purchase_moving_items_description:
1. Using your mouse, hover over the item and press .

2. Move the mouse to the new location and confirm by pressing .
help_purchase_removing_items_description:
1. Using your mouse, hover over the item and press .

2. Archive the item by pressing DELETE or clicking the Archive Icon in the bottom left corner.

Removing items doesn't delete them. They will simply be moved to your item inventory, allowing you to place the item again free of charge.
help_purchase_tip: Tip: You can place multiple instances of the same item by holding down <key>SHIFT</key> while placing the item.
help_researching_intro: Everything in Startup Company has to be unlocked via the Research Menu. After unlocking an item, it will instantly be available in the relevant context.
help_researching_description: All unlockables require a certain number of Research Points to be spent in order to be unlocked. You can produce Research Points by hiring Researchers.
help_researching_tip: Tip: After everything has been unlocked, there's no longer any need for Researchers and you should feel free to fire them.
help_recruitment_intro: You can recruit and hire employees either via your Chief Executive Officer or a Recruiter.
help_recruitment_headhunting_description:
Recruiting employees is done through two interactions. First, you headhunt potential candidates. Recruiters can only headhunt employees of the same level as themselves.

You're able to research each candidate's expected salary. This gives you a good estimate of what salary the employee expects. Second, you can choose to also research the employee's demands. This allows you to avoid candidates who do not fit into your current office and enabled benefits.

Researching any of these details will increase the time it takes to headhunt a candidate.

Headhunted candidates will only be available for 96 hours.
help_recruitment_negotiation_description: When negotiating with candidates, you can optionally offer them a signing bonus. This is an effective way of securing a lower monthly salary for a one-off upfront bonus.
help_recruitment_instant_hire_descriptio:
Expert Recruiters are able to instantly hire a candidate for a fixed salary. This allows you to avoid completing the time-consuming negotiation process.

To enable "Instantly Hire", your Recruiter has to be Expert level and both salary and demands have to be researched.
help_features_intro:
There are two types of website features in Startup Company: Base Features & Revenue Features. A feature will take up one slot on your website. You only have as many slots as your current framework supports.

All features have to be researched using the Research Menu.
help_features_base_features_description:
Base Features increase your website's User Capacity. The added capacity is based on the level of the feature. You can upgrade the level by pressing the Upgrade button. Each level requires a set of components or modules.

Every time you upgrade a feature, it will consume more Compute Units and increase your website's response time. To counter this, you can choose to improve the feature's efficiency. The efficiency can go up to 100% and will reduce both response time and consumed compute units.
help_features_revenue_features_descripti:
Revenue Features, unlike Base Features, do not take up any compute units (CU) and do not increase the website's response time. Instead, they allow you to generate an income from your website.

There are two types of income sources: Ads & Subscriptions. Both will reduce website satisfaction. A lower number means end-users will be more unhappy with the feature.

Framework Limitations

Your current framework limits how high a level your features become and also how many features you can add. Your framework can be upgraded when all feature slots are occupied and the maximum level is reached for all.
help_frameworks_intro:
A framework is the structure of your website. All features are built on top of your frameworks.

All websites start out with a Basic Framework. You can then upgrade to a wide selection of frameworks once you have researched them using the Research Menu.

New frameworks will decrease your overall compute unit (CU) consumption, increase feature slots and increase maximum feature level.
help_frameworks_upgrade_description:
Upgrading to a new framework requires two things:

  • All feature slots are occupied.
  • All base features are upgraded to the maximum level.

Once these requirements are met, you'll be able to upgrade the framework. All frameworks come with an upfront payment.
help_satisfaction_intro:
Satisfaction for your website is a vital part of growth and success.

There are three things that determine the website's satisfaction rating:

  • The satisfaction of base features
  • How many revenue features are in use
  • Support satisfaction
help_satisfaction_more_details: You can get more details about satisfaction by hovering over the smiley.
help_satisfaction_effect_description:
If your website's satisfaction goes below 50%, you will start to lose registered users.

The effectiveness of marketing campaigns and organic growth is based on your satisfaction rating. The higher the satisfaction, the easier it is to get more users.
help_hosting_intro: To keep your website online, you have to take care of hosting. There are two things to keep an eye on: Server Load and Response Time.
help_hosting_server_load_description: Server load should never go above 100%. If it does, it will start to increase your website's response time. To quickly reduce server load, you should install more servers to increase compute units (CU).
help_hosting_response_time_description: If response time becomes too high and your website goes into Unstable or Critical, it means that you should improve the efficiency of your website features.
help_hosting_servers_description:
All new websites start out using Virtual Servers. They allow you to rent servers on a daily basis.

Servers produce compute units (CU). To make sure your website runs smoothly, you have to ensure you produce more CU than your website requires.

As your website increases in size, you can no longer continue using Virtual Servers and you'll be forced to rent a Hosting Building and start setting up your own servers.
help_hosting_types_virtual_servers_descr:
Requires no initial investment. Fast and easy. Limited number of servers available.

Price per CU is more expensive.
help_hosting_types_hosting_building_desc:
Has a very high upfront cost because you have to rent a hosting building plus buy and set up racks and servers.

Price per CU is cheaper.
help_hosting_types_tip: Tip: Virtual Servers and Hosting Buildings can run side by side to cover your website's needs.
help_hosting_configuration_description:
All servers require a set of components. You'll need a SysAdmin in order to produce the components.

When components are spent on configuring servers, they cannot be restored.
help_marketing_intro:
You can use a marketing campaign to generate new traffic to your website.

There are 6 types of marketing campaign. The only thing that distinguishes them is their cost and conversion rate.

All campaigns require marketing components except for email campaigns. You'll need a Marketer in order to produce the components.
help_marketing_conversionrate_descriptio:
When running a marketing campaign, you'll be showing ads for your website to a limited number of people. The conversion rate indicates how many of these people actually click on your ad and become a visitor on your website.

A high conversion rate means more people click on your ad and you avoid spending money on showing ads to people who don't care about it.
help_marketing_reach_description: Reach defines how many people can potentially see your ad. Higher level features that haven't been promoted for a while will have the largest reach.
help_marketing_cpm_description: CPM indicates how much you pay to show your ad to 1000 people. Paying a higher CPM is often worth it, as long as the conversion rate is also equally higher.
help_marketing_targeting_description:
You can use targeting to improve your conversion rate. Limiting your targeting means showing your ads only to a specific audience/type of person.

In order to know if a target is a match, you will have to research the campaign.
help_marketing_targeting_example: In the example above, you will see that Food, Sports and the Age 26-50 was a good match. On the contrary, targeting Entertainment and Males was bad for the conversion rate.
help_racks_intro: Setting up your own Hosting Building starts with researching the desired racks and servers in the Research Menu.
help_racks_setting_up_description: Racks are like big containers that hold multiple servers. Racks are purchased from the Purchase Menu and placed the same way as furniture in office buildings.
help_racks_installing_description:
Servers are installed into racks. A server takes up a specific number of "units". All racks have a maximum number of units or "Us" available.

Just like with virtual servers, you have to configure a server using components before it works. Once a server is configured, it will start to produce throughput.
help_racks_throughput_description:
There are three types of throughput: Web, Cache and Database. In order to produce CU, you need all three. There will almost always be one throughput which is lower than the others.
    We call this "the bottleneck". The lowest throughput determines the amount of CU that your hosting building produces.
help_racks_throughput_example: In the example above, the database is the bottleneck and more Database Servers should be installed in order to increase the produced CU.
help_temperatures_understanding_descript:
As you start to add more servers to a rack, the temperature will gradually increase. Eventually, servers become too hot which will impact performance.

Servers contribute to the overall building temperature. Building temperature directly affects all rack temperatures.
help_temperatures_servermodes_descriptio: Server modes can be recognized by the color of the circle on the left side of the server. The overlays for racks are also color coded like so:
help_temperatures_servermodes_reduced_pe: One or more servers are in Reduced Performance Mode.
help_temperatures_servermodes_overheat: One or more servers are in Overheat Protection.
help_temperatures_servermodes_not_config: One or more servers are not configured.
help_temperatures_reduced_performance_de: The server produces throughput but performance has been decreased.
help_temperatures_overheat_protection_de: The server has shut down due to the high temperature in order to avoid any damage. No throughput is being produced.
help_temperatures_overclocking_descripti:
All servers can be overclocked. Overclocking a server means that you increase the clock rate. This will cause the server to produce more throughput, but it will also use more power and generate more heat.

Overclocking a server can cause overheating issues for both the server itself and for other servers because of the increased overall temperature.
help_temperatures_overclocking_extended: Overclocking can also be used to reduce heat and temperatures. By changing the clock rate to below 100%, the server will produce less throughput but also use less power and produce less heat.
help_temperatures_overclocking_tip: Tip: Control clock rate of multiple servers by installing a Centralized Clock Rate Controller (CCC).
help_vc_ownership_description:
The ownership indicates who owns part of your company. Having an investor doesn't mean they will take a cut of your revenue. Instead, they take a cut if you choose to sell the website.
    Investors earn money when your valuation increases.
help_vc_offers_description: As your website's valuation increases, you will start to receive investment offers. You give up a percentage of your ownership, but the money allows you to expand your company faster.
help_vc_buyback_description: You can buy back shares of your website by clicking on the desired share in the ownership bar. The price is defined by the website's current valuation.
help_events_intro: There are two types of events that can hit your website: DDoS Attacks & Viral Boosts
help_events_ddos_description:
A DDoS Attack is an attack targeted at overloading your servers and thereby making your website unavailable.

These attacks cannot be avoided, but you can make sure that your servers are sufficiently powerful to handle the attack.
help_events_viral_description:
A viral boost means that your website is very popular for a short time period. In this period, you'll be able to generate a ton of new users as long as your servers can take it.

Viral Boosts will only happen on websites with a high satisfaction rating.
help_support_intro:
As more and more users land on your website, support tickets will start to come in.

If tickets are ignored, your website's support satisfaction will decrease and directly affect your website's overall satisfaction rating.
help_support_resolving_description: To start resolving tickets, you have to hire a Supporter. New hires will automatically be assigned to the first available team of your first website.
help_support_complexity_description:
Tickets come in 3 complexities: Low, Medium and High.

All Supporters can handle all types of tickets, but the more complex a ticket is, the longer it will take to resolve it. Tickets should be resolved within 36 hours otherwise they will start to decrease the support satisfaction.

Tip: Supporters like to work on tickets that match their level otherwise they will start to become unhappy.
help_support_teams_description:
Using your website's Support tab, you can set up teams for your supporters. This is an important feature once you start receiving Medium and High complexity tickets.

By setting up teams, you can ensure that Supporters only handle tickets that match their level and speed.
help_ccc_intro: The CCC (Centralized Clock Rate Controller) unit allows you to control the clock rate of multiple servers and racks from one place.
help_ccc_assign_headline: Assigning a rack to a CCC
help_ccc_assign_description: To assign a single rack and all of it's servers to a CCC, you simply click the rack and choose the desired CCC from the dropdown list.
help_ccc_assign_multiple_headline: Assigning multiple racks to a CCC
help_ccc_assign_multiple_description: You can assign multiple racks to the same CCC using the Racks Menu.
help_ccc_clockrate_description: The default clock rate controls what the clock rate is when no rules are active.
help_ccc_rules_description: The CCC allows you to configure rules that change on specific events. For example, you can set the default clock rate to 0% and have the CCC turn up the clock rate to 100% in case of a DDoS Attack.
help_production_intro_1: The following employee types are able to produce components and modules: Developers, Designers, LeadDevelopers, Marketers and SysAdmins.
help_production_intro_2: Components and modules can be used to create various types of items like website features, servers or marketing campaigns.
help_production_intro_3: A module is simply a set of components that has been merged into one.
help_production_intro_4: A production employee can only produce one component or module at a time. The production time is based on the employee's total speed. If an employee is planned to create a module but it's requirements aren't available in the inventory, the production will halt.
help_production_unlocking_description: The production menu will only show the already researched Components and modules. To unlock more you have to go to the Research Menu
help_production_queue_description: The production queue allows you to plan ahead. The employee will automatically create the components/modules added to the queue. Once the end of this list is reached the employee will automatically start over.
help_production_tip: To automate the production and make it easier to manage multiple employees, you can use Managers.
help_ceo_intro_description: The CEO is the only employee type in Startup Company that allows changing skill.
help_ceo_change_description: You can change your CEO's skill at any time. Please notice changing the CEO's current skill will unassign selected employees (manager), cancel active tasks and any progress will be lost.
help_investment_intro:
As your company starts to expand you'll eventually reach a point where money is not a problem.

This is usually a good time to start investing in other projects than your own company. All investment projects unlocks a bonus that further strengthens your company.
help_investment_investing_description: All projects require both an upfront payment and a daily contribution. Within the specified limits, you define how much you want to contribute per day.
help_investment_cancel_description:
If you're no longer able to pay the minimum daily contribution, or you're no longer interested in the project you can decide to cancel the project. You'll lose all progress and money
invested. You won't be able to continue where you left off. The project has to be completely restarted, including paying the upfront payment.
tooltip_dismiss_cooldown: You have to wait {days} days before you can fire this employee.
sell_delete_website_warning: You have to buy out your investors in order to do this.
hrmanager_granted_raise_label: {employeename} ({employeetype}) salary was increased by {salaryraise}/month (including a {bonus} bonus) by a HR Manager.
allow_salary_raise_description: This will allow the HR Manager to automatically respond to all affected employees who request a salary raise due to competitor offers or low mood.
retire_now_warning: This action will end the game and cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to retire now?
upgrade_level_confirm: Are you sure you want to upgrade the selected employees to the next level? Salaries will be increased by {price}/month.
profilepage_description: Allow your users to create a personal profile page and view other users' profile.
manager_exceed_targets: Continue producing after all targets has been reached (distributed equally).
manager_skip_modules: Skip modules if their required components isn't available.
manager_production_tip: Production plans are shared between all managers.
firstsupportticket_warning: {productname} received its first support ticket. Make sure to hire a Supporter before the response time gets too high!
steam_visround_release: Startup Company is now out in Full Release, after almost 5 years in development!
steam_store_page_intro: Startup Company is a business simulation sandbox game. You’re the CEO of a small startup and are eager to grow your company. With a small investment, you set out to build an amazing website to compete against the largest tech giants in the world hoping to become the most valuable company in history.
steam_store_page_website_description: Your company’s success depends on your ability to run and manage a website. You must develop and improve features while increasing hosting capacity and run marketing campaigns.
steam_store_page_office_description: The city offers you offices in all sizes and shapes. It’s up to you to select the most suitable. It’s your job to organize and decorate the office while keeping your employees happy.
steam_store_page_employees_description: Your employees are a vital part of your success. As you grow, you must continue recruiting more people. Over time, your employees will start demanding more of you and the company. It’s your job to keep them happy, before your competitors send them a job offer they can’t reject!
steam_store_page_servers_description: There’s no website without stable and reliable servers. As your website attracts more traffic, you'll have to move from virtual servers to your own fully featured hosting center.
steam_store_page_competition_description: The goal is obvious: become the biggest website in the industry. It’s up to you if you want to buy and merge your competitors or outrun them until they go out of business!
steam_store_page_community_description:
We believe a strong community only improves the gaming experience. This is why Startup Company is fully moddable through the Steam Workshop.

We also invite our community to help translate the game through Localizor: [url]https://www.localizor.com/game/1/translations[/url]
help_camera_controls_panning_headline_in: The game camera has two options: panning and zooming. It is not possible to rotate the camera.
